info.name: Alumni Bidding Platform
info.description: Corrected Postman collection for the required-scope final project. Uses the real route prefixes from the generated codebase: /auth, /profile, /bids, /public, /health, /api-docs.

exec: pm.test('Status is 200 or 404 depending on data', function () {

request.description: This may return 404 until a winning bid exists for today's date.
Register a new alumnus with a valid university email. Requires EXPOSE_DEV_TOKENS=true in local .env to capture the verification token directly from the response.
Verify the alumnus email address using the one-time verification token.
Authenticate the verified alumnus and capture the JWT access token.
Check that the current bearer token is valid.
Generate a password reset token for the current alumnus. Requires EXPOSE_DEV_TOKENS=true locally to capture the reset token directly from the response.
Reset the alumnus password using the one-time reset token.
Authenticate again using the reset password and replace the stored JWT access token.
View JWT-authenticated request usage statistics for the current alumnus.
Invalidate all currently issued JWTs for this alumnus by incrementing tokenVersion.

exec: pm.test('Status is 401 after logout', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(401); });

request.description: Negative check: the previously captured JWT should now be rejected after logout.
Get a fresh JWT after logout so later profile and bidding flows can continue.
Create a second alumnus account that remains unverified for negative login testing.
Create the authenticated alumnus profile. This uses JSON to keep import simple. The route also accepts multipart/form-data if you want to attach profileImage manually in Postman.
Create the authenticated alumnus profile. This uses JSON to keep import simple. The route also accepts multipart/form-data if you want to attach profileImage manually in Postman.

item.name: Create profile with invalid LinkedIn URL
Update profile with invalid degrees type

request.description: Fetch the single active bidding cycle that ends at the next 6 PM. Users can only bid in this cycle.
Place a blind bid in the current active cycle. No highest amount is revealed.
Returns winning/losing/not_placed feedback only.
Increase-only bid update inside the same active cycle.

item.name: Reject Duplicate Bid In Same Active Cycle

request.description: Run this while an active bid already exists in the current cycle, for example after 'Place Fresh Bid After Cancel' and before processing.

request.description: Works when {{bidId}} points to an active bid whose amount is higher than 100.
